description:
Audit found 9 packages with newer upstream versions available (as of 2026-03-15). Bump each, verify builds, and update defaults.

## Packages to update

| Package | Current | Latest | Risk |
|---|---|---|---|
| go | 1.26.0 | 1.26.1 | low (patch) |
| biome | 2.4.6 | 2.4.7 | low (patch) |
| ruff | 0.15.5 | 0.15.6 | low (patch) |
| uv | 0.10.9 | 0.10.10 | low (patch) |
| beads | 0.52.0 | 0.60.0 | medium (minor, big jump) |
| beads-rust | 0.1.14 | 0.1.28 | medium (many patches) |
| beads-viewer | 0.14.4 | 0.15.2 | medium (minor) |
| rust | 1.92.0 | 1.94.0 | high (bootstrap compiler) |
| buck2 | 2025-12-01 | 2026-03-15 | high (large delta, Rust dep) |

## Phasing

Phase 1 (foundation): go — other Go packages depend on toolbox Go.
Phase 2 (low-risk patches): biome, ruff, uv — independent Rust binaries.
Phase 3 (moderate): beads, beads-rust, beads-viewer — check release notes for build changes.
Phase 4 (larger): rust, then buck2 — rust is a bootstrap compiler; buck2 depends on it.

## Process per package

1. Prefetch source hash: `nix-prefetch-url --type sha256 --unpack <url>` → `nix hash convert --hash-algo sha256 --to sri <hash>`
2. Add version entry to `data.json`, update `_meta.default`
3. For Go/Rust packages: set `vendorHash` to `""`, build, capture correct hash from error
4. `nix build .#<pkg>.default` to verify
5. Test binary with `./result/bin/<binary> --version` or similar

```mermaid
graph LR
    go[go 1.26.1] --> beads[beads 0.60.0]
    biome[biome 2.4.7]
    ruff[ruff 0.15.6]
    uv[uv 0.10.10]
    beads-rust[beads-rust 0.1.28]
    beads-viewer[beads-viewer 0.15.2]
    rust[rust 1.94.0] --> buck2[buck2 2026-03-15]
```
title: Bump outdated packages to latest versions
